name: audio-tts-openai
description: OpenAI TTS provider for VoiceMode. Registers an OpenAITTS entry into the `ttsProviders` register; voice mode picks it up when the user selects 'OpenAI' under Settings → Voice → TTS provider. Audio is fetched from /v1/tts/openai (served by the audio-tts-openai bridge module) and played via an HTMLAudioElement. Disabling this FE module removes the 'OpenAI' option without touching voice/.
